title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies!
